detail.description:
Welcome to Block Crush — a classic block puzzle and line-clear game designed for those who love fitting blocks, clearing lines, and strategic spatial reasoning. Whether you are looking for a puzzle for adults to sharpen your mind or a relaxing way to pass the time offline, Block Crush delivers a premium experience inspired by iconic block-shaping logic.

Every move counts. As a thoughtful brain teaser, this game challenges you to control the grid and manage space through precise placement. Since
